data.name: Animus Non Grata
data.detailed_description:
Animus Non Grata - Special Edition

Animus Non Grata has been remastered and remade in Ren'Py! This Steam page contains the remastered version. The old html 'Twine' version is included in the installation folder, available by opening the "Old Version" folder link in the special edition's main menu.

Synopsis

A story-rich adult visual novel where desire meets rebellion. Awaken as an illegal AI android, torn between your programming and the fight for freedom. Will you embrace trust and passion, or carve your own path in a world that fears you? Discover terrifying secrets of the people around you, and your own past. Your journey as an Animus Non Grata starts now.

In this game you play as a female android, who has lost her memory. You wake up in the house of a man who claims to have saved you from being disassembled like all the other androids of a research facility. In doing so, he risks spending the rest of his life in prison should anyone find out. You'll soon find yourself embracing, or struggling against, your designed programming and built-in behavior. Meanwhile, your savior adamantly enforces you to conform with them, regardless of what you want. It's for your own safety, or so he says. He also claims he wants to help you, to give you your freedom, but his actions seem to tell a different story...

Animus Non Grata is aimed for an adult audience only and features a lot of sexual scenes. The game explores adult themes, with a focus on bdsm and bondage. You play as a female protagonist in this story.

CONTENT WARNING: This game features scenes that many may consider disturbing. The themes explored can be dark.

Key Features

  • Female Protagonist 

  • An adult game focusing in exploring BDSM and bondage 

  • Build a love and/or hate relationship with the main NPC "Donovan Smith", shaping the story in both subtle and major ways.

  • Story rich thriller: Gradually builds up tension throughout your journey. 

  • 7 Chapters with 165 000 words of story 

  • Over 430 unique, high quality 3D images. 

  • Your choices matter. How will your story end? (There are 5 endings)

  • Special Edition "Renpy" remastered version also contains the old "Twine" version of the game in the installation folder. The old version is accessible from the game's main menu.

Praise For Animus Non Grata

  • "One of the best NSFW games to come out this year!"

  • "If you haven't played this game already, then freaking check it out!"

  • "Excellent writing, top 1% around here!"

  • "This could win awards!"

  • "The story is intense and very well written!"

Credits

  • Development and Writing: Flimsylegs

  • Art: Synthetic Rush

  • Music: Abstraction

  • Spanish translation: PrinDaisynha

  • Proof-checking Spanish translation: Vicho75

NOTE: Spanish version is only available in the old version "Old Twine Version", available from the Special Edition's main menu.

data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 西班牙文 - 西班牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: 1 GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Any
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間
